ddt:Target.Name: N_X52F_ACC_20051216_1
ddt:Target.Description:
1.00 version : 1.Dec. 2003 Nissan KR6 Watanabe modify the data type of Diagnostic identification code. 1.20 vesion : 11.May. 2004 Nissan KR6 K.Konishi This xml was based on the naming rule version 0.40. 1.30 :02.July.2004 NISSAN K.Konishi
1.40: 2005/12/15 KR6 K.Yamauchi Correction of Data Monitor
1.50: 2005/12/16 KR6 K.Yamauchi Modification of Data Monitor Naming

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or short circuit to ground
Open circuit or short circuit to battery
Assembly Line testing and After-Sales Session
Assembly Line testing and After-Sales Session

Request.Name: Output Control
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen
